summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Zivio AI restaurant ordering demo. All backend APIs working (11/11 tests passed). Frontend loads correctly with dark/gold theme. Chat functionality with AI responses containing Indian fillers (ji, haan, achha) working. Order detection, deduplication, and confirmation flow working. All navigation screens render correctly. ElevenLabs TTS returns 500 as expected (external service limitation).

minor.issue: Returns 500 due to ElevenLabs free tier blocking - expected behavior per requirements, frontend has browser SpeechSynthesis fallback

critical_code_review_comments: ChatPanel.jsx line 318: useEffect has missing dependencies (addMessage, getRecentOrder, speak) - minor warning, not breaking
CallModal.jsx line 185: useEffect has missing dependencies (callSpeak, setCS) - minor warning, not breaking
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: health endpoint, chat with English/Hindi/Punjabi, session persistence, order detection, deduplication, navigation screens, language tabs, quick suggestions, Demo Call modal. TTS endpoint returns 500 due to ElevenLabs blocking - this is expected and documented.

backend: POST /api/chat - English message with AI reply containing Indian fillers
POST /api/chat - Hindi message with Hindi response
POST /api/chat - Punjabi message with Punjabi response
POST /api/tts - Endpoint exists (returns 500 due to ElevenLabs block)
frontend: Demo Call button present and opens modal
Sidebar navigation - all 8 screens render (Problem, Solution, Features, Compare, Kitchen, Campaign, Pricing, Get Started)
Demo screen shows chat panel with greeting containing 'ji'
Chat input allows typing and sending messages
Order panel detects menu items from chat
Order items are deduplicated (Garlic Naan appears once)
Confirm Order button appears when items in cart
Order confirmation creates ticket with 'Preparing' status
Pricing screen shows $799 and guarantee section
Compare table shows Uber Eats vs DoorDash vs Zivio data
Noise filter badge visible at bottom of chat panel
